metadata.query: {"goal_statement":"Establish the technical, regulatory, and political basis for formal platform-neutral access requirements and a certified fallback authentication path for Danish digital identity within 24 months.","smart_criteria":{"specific":"The goal is to create a foundation for platform-neutral access requirements and a certified fallback authentication path for Danish digital identity.","measurable":"Success will be measured by the publication of a feasibility report, delivery of two working demonstrators, a formal written response from Digitaliseringsstyrelsen, and inclusion of platform-neutrality language in at least one AltID-related document.","achievable":"The goal is achievable by focusing on influencing AltID and related procurement decisions, rather than attempting to replace MitID directly, and by building a coalition of support.","relevant":"This goal is relevant because it addresses the Danish public-sector digital strategy's call for reduced dependence on a small number of large foreign technology suppliers and for stronger digital sovereignty.","time_bound":"The project is to be completed within 24 months."},"dependencies":["Secure funding for each phase of the project.","Establish a physical base in Copenhagen.","Build a coalition of support spanning civil-society organisations, privacy advocates, academic researchers, security experts, contingency-planning stakeholders, and sympathetic members of Folketinget's digital policy committee."],"resources_required":["Mobile security and authentication protocols expertise","Regulatory and compliance specialist familiar with Danish and EU digital identity frameworks","Policy and public-affairs coordinator experienced in Danish digital governance and procurement processes","Technical lead for the demonstrator work","Engineer or contractor covering web authentication, hardware-token workflows, or Linux/GrapheneOS-related implementation","Access-controlled workspace appropriate for security-sensitive digital identity research","Budget for institutional overhead","Budget for external security review","Budget for limited legal/procurement support"],"related_goals":["Reduce Denmark's dependence on foreign technology suppliers.","Strengthen Denmark's digital sovereignty.","Ensure continuity of service for Danish digital identity.","Influence European Digital Identity Wallet standards."],"tags":["digital identity","digital sovereignty","platform neutrality","eIDAS","AltID","procurement","Denmark","resilience","cybersecurity"],"risk_assessment_and_mitigation_strategies":{"key_risks":["Delays in obtaining permits/approvals.","Demonstrators difficult to implement. Dependence on specific platforms.","Cost overruns. Budget gated across phases.","Lack of buy-in from stakeholders. Resistance from vendors.","Difficulty securing physical base in Copenhagen.","Vulnerabilities in demonstrators.","Complexity of integrating with MitID."],"diverse_risks":["Financial risks","Social risks","Technical risks","Operational risks","Security risks","Integration risks"],"mitigation_plans":["Conduct due diligence in Phase 1. Engage authorities. Develop contingency plans.","Maintain a lean scope. Implement early prototyping. Ensure sufficient expertise.","Implement budget tracking. Establish clear phase gate criteria. Maintain a contingency fund.","Engage stakeholders proactively. Frame the issue strategically. Build a strong coalition.","Search for a physical base early in Phase 1. Explore multiple options. Negotiate lease terms.","Implement robust security measures. Conduct regular security reviews. Engage external experts.","Focus on AltID. Develop clear guidelines. Conduct thorough testing. Engage the MitID operator."]},"stakeholder_analysis":{"primary_stakeholders":["Lead Researcher","Regulatory and Compliance Specialist","Policy and Public-Affairs Coordinator","Technical Lead","Engineers/Contractors"],"secondary_stakeholders":["Digitaliseringsstyrelsen","MitID Operator","Civil-society organizations","Privacy advocates","Academic researchers","Security experts","Contingency-planning stakeholders","Members of Folketinget's digital policy committee","EU bodies and technical working groups"],"engagement_strategies":["Provide regular updates and progress reports to primary stakeholders.","Answer requests for information from primary stakeholders promptly.","Provide updates on key milestones to secondary stakeholders.","Provide reports for compliance to secondary stakeholders.","Notify secondary stakeholders of significant changes to project scope or timeline in a timely manner."]},"regulatory_and_compliance_requirements":{"permits_and_licenses":["Data protection licenses","Security certifications"],"compliance_standards":["eIDAS","NSIS","GDPR"],"regulatory_bodies":["Danish Data Protection Agency","European Data Protection Board"],"compliance_actions":["Apply for data protection licenses","Schedule compliance audits","Implement compliance plan for GDPR","Implement compliance plan for eIDAS","Implement compliance plan for NSIS"]}}
